entity.summary: Centralized crypto exchange founded in 2017 and described by current official ecosystem material as headquartered in Uralsk, Kazakhstan.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0290 and hei_unadded_0291 as one entity. BitexLive's official tokenomics and ecosystem page states that the exchange was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Uralsk, Kazakhstan.

events.title: Bitexlive recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: Bitexlive is recorded as a Kazakhstan-headquartered centralized exchange, with CoinPaprika and CoinGecko candidate rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch-date or legal-provider event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: BitexLive tokenomics and ecosystem profile
